title: Public Health Agency of Canada’s organizational structure - Canada.ca
content:
## Public Health Agency of Canada’s organizational structure
Find information on the Public Health Agency of Canada’s (PHAC) leaders, organizational branches and regional offices.
Meet the Public Health Agency of Canada's leaders.
The Honourable Marjorie Michel

## Branches and offices
- Office of Audit and Evaluation
- Science and Policy Integration Branch Behavioural Science Office
- Behavioural Science Office
- National Microbiology Laboratory Branch
- Infectious Diseases and Vaccination Programs Branch
- Health Promotion and Chronic Disease Prevention Branch
- Chief Financial Officer and Corporate Management Branch
- Regulatory, Operations and Emergency Management Branch
The Public Health Agency of Canada (PHAC) is a federal institution that is part of the Health Portfolio .
